session.user:
Run the following commands and report results. Do NOT modify any files.
1. Run: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_plan_phase.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/lifecycle.py 2>&1` 2. Run: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_plan_phase.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/lifecycle.py 2>&1` 3. Run: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_plan_phase.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/lifecycle.py 2>&1`
Report the output of all three commands.
session.assistant: I'll run these three commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting check on two files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on two files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checking on two files

session.assistant:
## Results
**Command 1: ruff check** - PASSED ``` All checks passed! ```
**Command 2: ruff format --check** - PASSED ``` 2 files already formatted ```
**Command 3: ty check** - PASSED ``` All checks passed! ```
All three quality checks passed successfully. Both files are properly formatted and pass linting and type checking validation.
